rows.content:
Intercom was in a bad spot a few years ago.

We invested well before that and didn't think we'd see a meaningful return.

rows.author: dotey
rows.content:
我做 AI 翻译这件事，前前后后折腾了快两年。从最早手写提示词，到现在用 Agent 自动分块、并行翻译、审校润色，中间踩了不少坑，也攒了不少经验。最近把这些经验沉淀成了一个可复用的翻译 Skill。

先说说翻译这个场景为什么比看上去要复杂。提示词本身很简单，“把这段话翻译成中文”谁都会写。 https://t.co/ODsBHbau11
rows.bio: Prompt Engineer, dedicated to learning and disseminating knowledge about AI, software engineering, and engineering management.

rows.author: dongxi_nlp
rows.content:
「 Shadow APIs 」

Shadow APIs：声称提供官方前沿 LLMs 的第三方接口，绕过定价、支付和地域限制。

这些服务，是否真的提供了与官方API相同的模型？
研究证明，Shadow APIs 存在模型降级嫌疑，并不可信。

似乎，Shadow APIs 提供商通过routing，在利用模型差，赚取巨额利润。

是这样么？ https://t.co/1fyDDGvtW0
rows.bio: Prev. PhD @Stockholm_Uni | Alumni @KTHuniversity @uppsalauni Sharing insights on AI, autonomous agents, and large language & reasoning models

rows.author: allen_ai
rows.content: What explains the success of Olmo Hybrid? We prove hybrid models are more expressive than transformers or RNNs alone, being capable of representing a broader class of functions related to code evaluation. https://t.co/cr5lbvs5t3
rows.bio:
Breakthrough AI to solve the world's biggest problems.

› Join us: https://t.co/MjUpZpKPXJ
› Newsletter: https://t.co/k9gGznstwj

rows.author: allen_ai
rows.content:
Key finding: hybrid models are substantially more data-efficient than transformers.

We show this through rigorous theory + controlled experiments. On MMLU, Olmo Hybrid matches Olmo 3’s accuracy using 49% fewer tokens—roughly 2× efficiency. https://t.co/cI2KMfJlhJ
rows.bio:
Breakthrough AI to solve the world's biggest problems.

› Join us: https://t.co/MjUpZpKPXJ
› Newsletter: https://t.co/k9gGznstwj

rows.author: allen_ai
rows.content:
Olmo Hybrid’s gains hold across pretraining evals.

After pretraining and mid-training, Olmo Hybrid outperforms Olmo 3 in every primary evaluation domain. It wins big on long-context too—on RULER 64k, performance jumps from 70.9% to 85.0%. 🚀 https://t.co/m6tfTcXEFK
rows.bio:

rows.author: allen_ai
rows.content:
Olmo Hybrid uses a 3:1 pattern—three Gated DeltaNet layers followed by one attention layer.

This replaces 75% of attention with linear recurrence while keeping attention frequent enough to recover details the recurrent state compresses away. https://t.co/J1E9IhXFoK

rows.author: jeremyphoward
rows.content: Our legal analysis shows that this critical claim from OpenAI, that "use of our systems must still remain aligned with the current standards reflected in the agreement", is very unlikely to be supported by their contract with the DoW, or by the law. https://t.co/uQOujqGSuT

rows.author: jeremyphoward
rows.content: Whilst mechanisms exist that in theory can freeze reference to legislation to a point in time, they are very rare, almost never used in government contracts, and would be unlikely to be enforceable in this case. https://t.co/xia0lqCe9N

rows.author: jeremyphoward
rows.content:
This is also true of contracts with the government.

In Winstar (1996) the Supreme Court held 7-2 that a clause referring to "all applicable statutes" required obeying future laws as they arose; it did *not* freeze the regulatory framework at the time of signing. https://t.co/N8SyOCU4WQ

rows.author: jeremyphoward
rows.content: Case law on this goes back >100 years. A 1911 case noted that that contracts must not freeze legislation, else “individuals and corporations could… in anticipation of legislation, render of no avail the exercise by Congress… of its power to regulate commerce.” https://t.co/QpQ87CQSSy

rows.author: jeremyphoward
rows.content: Based on this language, OpenAI's claim "even if those laws or policies change in the future, use of our systems must still remain aligned with the current standards reflected in the agreement" is not supported. https://t.co/znJEF0RAPr

rows.author: jeremyphoward
rows.content: The contracts goes on to reference an existing directive (DoD Directive 3000.09), but does not do so in a way that adds any contractual constraints. https://t.co/BoUOhXgdfD

rows.author: jeremyphoward
rows.content: The specific contract language shared states "The Department of War may use the AI System for all lawful purposes". Although additional language is appended in that sentence, the language does not add practical constraints. https://t.co/zYQQZmyUfO

Austin Kleon在《Steal Like an Artist》中提到著名演员杰瑞·宋飞用日历坚持每天写笑话。

方法很简单：买一个全年挂历，每天完成画个叉，叉号会连成一条链子，越来越长，目标是不断。

其实就是视觉化打卡，作者写作也用了类似方法。

打开Claude Code，描述需求，用Tauri写一个工具自用。 https://t.co/OI0WloCgBy

rows.author: tomgoldsteincs
rows.content: Latent diffusion models are built inside a VAE. Classical VAE loss functions try to map images into a Gaussian distribution, but they don’t do this well. rows.author: tomgoldsteincs
rows.content:
Scaling laws can predict the training loss for different over-training factors. For a fixed FLOP budget, a 2X overtrained model is smaller than optimal, but gets to train on 2X the optimal tokens for its size.

Scaling laws predict that you lose very little by overtraining. https://t.co/ra2MWyXOPw
rows.bio:
Professor at UMD. AI security & privacy, algorithmic bias, foundations of ML.
Follow me for commentary on state-of-the-art AI.

rows.author: tomgoldsteincs
rows.content: Chinchilla says optimal models should have 1 parameter per 20 tokens.  This makes models really big.  Our scaling law predicts that "optimal" models should be even bigger.  But this doesn't mean you should train large models. https://t.co/dX6Yyc5AGA

The same cannot always be said for any of the other players.

rows.content:
People are misunderstanding her. 

It’s important to remember that a variant of semantic search is still happening 

1. User writes a query 
2. You send that query to a LLM with semantic understanding that knows what other tokens in latent space are similar to the query 
3. LLM

@lidangzzz 其实因为计算语言学的历史原因，直到如今，很多欧美院校的 NLP 硕士阶段的学位，都是 Master of Art。而读计算语言学的同学，很多本科阶段是纯语言学的。

虽然是 Master of Art，但要求其实非常严格，例如只允许使用 linux 做实验，只允许使用 latex 写报告，甚至强烈要求使用 emacs 做代码编辑器。

Model "shallowness" is a big deal in the time of AI agents, models can be very good in narrow areas but since they are shallow, they lack context and reasoning to make good judgement calls when doing tasks. 

Once you are operating independently, being good at coding isn't enough

rows.content:
Glaze 是 Raycast 推出的第二款产品，核心理念是让每个人都能轻松创建专业级桌面应用。

最大的突破是降低了开发门槛。

你只需要用自然语言告诉 Glaze 想要什么，它就能自动生成一个真正的桌面应用，放在你的 Dock 栏里。

不需要会写代码，普通人也能把想法变成现实。

应用体验非常原生和专业。

rows.content:
一个海外团队对开源模型的观察，看到底哪些开源模型最牛逼，最受欢迎。

指标叫：相对采用度指标（RAM）

把模型下载量，跟同等规模模型对比，找出最流行的。

比如GPT-OSS，受欢迎程度简直爆表，是Llama 3.1之后美国最受欢迎的开源模型。

另外，最近值得关注的几个模型

Qwen 3.5-397B-A17B

rows.author: vista8
rows.content:
StepFun和复旦大学的这个OmniLottie论文好啊，以后大模型生成Lottie动画也变强了。

把Lottie文件转换成一串简洁的"指令+参数"序列，然后交给大模型学习。

专注学动画本身规律，而不浪费精力去记JSON格式。

从LottieFiles、IconScout等爬了120万个动画，还有200万个从静态SVG生成的Lottie动画。

rows.author: vista8
rows.content:
原来有这么多种推理模式啊：

溯因推理：看到结果推原因。比如看到一个人打开冰箱，你得猜他为什么这么做。

类比推理：找相似关系。给你三张动物图片，让你找第四张来保持同样的关系模式。

因果推理：从原因推结果。比如一个物体撞击另一个，会发生什么。

rows.author: natolambert
rows.content:
An existential risk for near term open-weight models. In the coming years, the only places with business reasons for building them
1) non profits -- good for research/the world
2) nvidia's -- keep their hardware up with ai
3) meta's -- commodotize their complements

rows.author: BessemerVP
rows.content:
8/ Our hypothesis: the "ChatGPT moment" for robotics is on the horizon as industry leaders make key advancements: 

→ Commoditizing hardware, 
→ Improving locomotion
→ Pushing the frontier of manipulation.

Read the full deck: https://t.co/wcinaXCzAe
rows.bio: For the entrepreneurs who want to build revolutions of their own.

rows.author: BessemerVP
rows.content:
7/ Where we see early opportunities:
→ Vision-native verticals
→ Picks-and-shovels infrastructure
→ High-value end-to-end autonomy
rows.bio: For the entrepreneurs who want to build revolutions of their own.

rows.author: BessemerVP
rows.content:
6/ So what does the path there actually look like?
→ Foundation models that generalize across embodiments
→  Data flywheels that compound in the real world
→  Distribution into repeatable high-value workflows
rows.bio: For the entrepreneurs who want to build revolutions of their own.

rows.author: BessemerVP
rows.content:
5/ If embodied AI unlocks true convergence, that curve bends. 

And that could equal 50x growth in total robots worldwide over the next 10 years.
rows.bio: For the entrepreneurs who want to build revolutions of their own.

rows.author: BessemerVP
rows.content:
4/ Robotics has also been a tough category for investors historically. 

Capital has flowed in consistently, but liquidity events have not kept pace.

And yet, unit growth has continued 3x over the last decade.
rows.bio: For the entrepreneurs who want to build revolutions of their own.

rows.author: BessemerVP
rows.content:
1/What will the "ChatGPT moment" for robotics look like?

LLMs took off when three forces converged: scale, usability, and distribution.

We break down where robotics stands today and where we see the earliest investment opportunities developing. 🧵
rows.bio: For the entrepreneurs who want to build revolutions of their own.

rows.author: BessemerVP
rows.content:
3/ But the challenges are real.

→ Embodied data is scarce and fragmented.
→ Robots are still task-specific and hardware-constrained.
→ Physical deployment doesn't scale the way software does.
rows.bio: For the entrepreneurs who want to build revolutions of their own.

rows.author: BessemerVP
rows.content:
2/ Robotics is making real advances across key fronts: 
→ Breakthrough locomotion
→ Improved dexterity
→ Early foundation models
→ Growing compute
→ Influx of talent
rows.bio: For the entrepreneurs who want to build revolutions of their own.

rows.author: dotey
rows.content:
OpenAI 发布了 GPT-5.3 Instant，替换 ChatGPT 中使用最广的日常对话模型 GPT-5.2 Instant。

核心改进有三块：

1. 第一是减少“说教感”

之前的模型经常在回答前加一大段“我能帮什么、不能帮什么”的免责声明，或者对正常问题过度拒绝。新版本会直接回答问题，不再绕弯子。OpenAI

rows.content: Here's a side-by-side speed and accuracy comparison comparing Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite against our older Gemini 2.5 Flash model.
